nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Perl-specific coding-style rules covering standards, immutability, formatting (perltidy), and linting (perlcritic), extending the common coding-style baseline.
nodes.languageNotes: Frontmatter scopes the rule to Perl source globs (.pl, .pm, .t, .psgi, .cgi).

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Perl-specific automation-hook rules describing PostToolUse hooks and warning handling, extending the common hooks baseline.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Perl-specific design-pattern rules covering the repository pattern, DTOs/value objects, resource management, module interfaces, and dependency management, extending the common patterns baseline.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Perl-specific security rules covering taint mode, input validation, file I/O, process execution, SQL-injection prevention, and security scanning, extending the common security baseline.
nodes.languageNotes: Emphasizes Perl taint mode (-T) as a first-class defense mechanism.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Perl-specific testing rules covering the test framework, runner (prove), coverage (Devel::Cover), mocking, and common pitfalls, extending the common testing baseline.
